caption:
A customer books an appointment. Then they don't show up.

Most shops leave it there. The slot sits empty. The lead goes cold. Nobody follows up because it's nobody's job to notice.

Here's the automated recovery sequence that runs instead:

1. Appointment window closes, no check-in. CRM flags it as a no-show automatically.

2. 10 minutes later. First text offers an instant reschedule link.

3. 2 hours later, if silent. Second text, softer angle, phone number included.

4. 24 hours later, if still silent. Moved to a monthly nurture list instead of dropped.

This is an example workflow, not a client account. The logic applies to any shop running a booking calendar.

Want this built for your business?

DM "NOSHOW" and the Black Arrow team will walk you through it.

#ServiceBusiness #CRMAutomation #LeadFollowUp #HomeServices #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Fills the under-served Demonstrations/System Walkthroughs slot with an unclaimed stage (the no-show, not the missed call or the quote) using the carousel format research shows wins saves and depth for B2B educational content.
